scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,DASHBOARD -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:dashboard"
scripts.init:voice: npm run build --workspace @freeos/memory-core && npm run build --workspace @freeos/voice-core && node tools/scripts/init-voice.js
scripts.init:tools: npm run build --workspace @freeos/memory-core && npm run build --workspace @freeos/voice-core && npm run build --workspace @freeos/tool-runner && node tools/scripts/init-tools.js
scripts.research:status: npm run build --workspace @freeos/memory-core && npm run build --workspace @freeos/research-core && node tools/scripts/research-status.js
